docs.text: Welcome to MkDocs For full documentation visit mkdocs.org . Commands mkdocs new [dir-name] - Create a new project. mkdocs serve - Start the live-reloading docs server. mkdocs build - Build the documentation site. mkdocs -h - Print help message and exit. Project layout mkdocs.yml # The configuration file. docs/ index.md # The documentation homepage. ... # Other markdown pages, images and other files.

docs.title: 8th:

docs.text: 7th Tasks: - codewar 1 training - study ML-2 Bayes' 10th Tasks: - codewar 2 fundations + 1 rank up - finish studying ML-2 Bayes' - sleep at 11:00 p.m. 11th Tasks: - wake up before 7:00 a.m. - codewar 2 fundations + 1 rank up - finish studying ML-2 Bayes' - taking note in notebook ML-2 Bayes' Note: 我就是個不夠自律的人。 這個暑假，我奢侈的過著，這樣的空白，也讓我反思了一下。本來只是想隨手寫些心情記事，上網查了一下有沒有人跟我遇到一樣的困難，這些人解決辦法是什麼。在搜尋欄輸入我的情境：明明知道自己能力不足，導致作業速度慢，卻浪費時間不盡早開始。明明知道看劇花掉很多時間，卻一集接著一集開來看。總結，我的病症就是，缺乏自律。 曾經，我聽了朋友的一句話，過度深信，他說：「自己不對自己好一點，誰來對自己好。」這句話被我用來應付缺乏自律能力的藉口。讀書好累，沒有動力的時候，我誤用這句話，想著：休息一下沒關係吧！反正我不對自己好，誰會對我好呢？我錯了，我根本對自己太好，以及，對自己的好，不應該用在這裡。 搜尋時，有許多不錯的想法，我該換一下座右銘了，不要再一味的對自己好。 對自己嚴格一點，不要耽誤自己變成更好的人。 另外，先認清，自己到底是想要，還是一定要。有時候不是做不到，是不夠想要去做。聽說，火力全開努力的感覺會很好，會上癮，那就試試看吧。 如果知道路遠，那就早點出發；如果清楚和別人能力差距很大，那就多投入時努力；如果意識到有個難改的壞習慣，那就多準備耐心和決心。 最後，紀錄我曾經看過的一本書《牧羊少年奇幻之旅》，唯一記得的一句話： When you want something, all the universe conspires in helping you to achieve it. 我要當努力往目標邁進的人。目標：碩士畢業並找到一個工程師的好工作，成為一個厲害的工程師。 12th Tasks: - finish taking note in notebook ML-2 Bayes' - finish taking note in notebook ML-2 Bayes' Exercise - codewar 2 fundations + 1 rank up 13th Tasks: - studying ML-3 Regression - Academic Writing (5 mins copy) - Deutsch learning: start all over with Anki - codewar 2 fundations + 1 rank up Done: - studying ML-3 Regression to page - codewar 4 fundations Note: 為什麼我要學德文？ 在德國，用英文也可以，但是，對方不一定會英文，對方的英文不一定好，我可能不懂對方的意思，對方可能誤會我的意思，最後，受損的也只是我，甚至有損我的錢包。因為看不懂也聽不懂德文，我虧了多少錢，也許目前是小錢，將來有沒有可能會虧大，對方當我外國人就亂講或裝死，為什麼我要這樣當弱勢？憑什麼只能是弱勢？難道我就學不來德文嗎？ 未來，如果能用德文帶著家人朋友到處玩，用德文幫忙其他人，就是爽。學吧！ Tasks examples: - studying ML-3 Regression - Academic Writing (5 mins copy) - Deutsch learning: start all over with Anki - codewar 2 fundations + 1 rank up

docs.title: 13th

docs.text: 過保護小姐 配備奇怪主角群的戲劇之一，原來日本人想像中的過保護小姐會長這樣，加穗子真的很可愛。演員演得好，高畑充希和竹內涼真剛剛好，好搭。 狂賭之淵-真人版 真心佩服日本人，他們很會創造奇怪的角色，當所有角色都很奇怪的時候，整部劇就不奇怪了。真的會像在賭博一樣一直看下去。動畫版進度比較快，已經開始看動畫版，但等真人版出了，也要回頭再看真人版。
docs.title: J-drama

docs.text: 4 stars 有好有壞，有明顯缺點。或是沒什麼缺點，但整體不吸引人，不會想在看一次的劇。 Memories of the Alhambra 阿爾罕布拉宮的回憶 (2018) Ending sucks The Uncanny Counter 驅魔麵館 (2020) terrible ending Business Proposal 社內相親 (2022) One of my favorite leading actress acts in this drama. Even there is no suprise in the end, I still like this drama. The King's Affection 戀慕 (2021) I don't remember anything good of it. Her Private Life 她的私生活 (2019) The main actress is good. I don't like the main actor. Vincenzo 黑道律師文森佐 (2021) the story last too long. the romance is not enough. Mystic Pop-up Bar 雙甲路邊攤 (2020) it's okay. not bad. but not highly recommended. Remarriage & Desires 再婚上流 (2022) interesting revenge of marriage story Alchemy of Souls 還魂 (2022) Stupid ending. What is that bell???? I don't see the connection of each important element. They seems like that they happened to know how to use those element to solve problem. It's unbelievable. Forecasting Love and Weather 氣象廳的人們：社內戀愛殘酷史篇 (2022) everything happen way too fast. The plot shows each personality it wants to talk about. But, the way it describe the personality is not enough. Nothing really builds up, and then, the problem is solved. Ridiculous. Minamdang 美男堂 (2022) The plot okay. But there are too many unnessacerry parts. I don't like the two main actor/actress. All other actors/actresses are good. Young Lady and Gentleman 紳士與小姐 (2021) I can understand why it gets the highest watching rate. People just need this kind of drama.
docs.title: kDrama4

docs.text: 5 stars 演員、劇情、攝影畫面，整體優秀，會想再看一次。 Hospital Playlist 機智醫生生活 (2020)(2021) Best korean drama ever. Lovestruck in the City 愛在大都會 (2020) My favorite romance comedy. Because This Is My First Life 今生是第一次 (2017) One of my favorite leading actress (Jung So-min) acts in this drama. Even other characters are not attractive, they didn't lower the score I gave to this drama. Hometown Cha-Cha-Cha 海岸村恰恰恰 (2021) All the characters have vivid personality. The story of everyone is present well. The plot goes smoothly and delightful. Extraordinary Attorney Woo 非常律師禹英禑 (2022) It's cute and warm. I really enjoy it. Our Beloved Summer 那年，我們的夏天 (2021) Every actor and actress performs so well. I also like the idea of the whole story.
docs.title: K-drama with 5 stars
